chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Cr. Bail Appln. No. S-438 of 2024 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of bail application. 24-02-2025 Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, DPG for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Mujahid Ali Tunio advocate holding brief for Mr. Nawabuddin Chandio learned counsel for the applicant, under the instructions of latter counsel does not press instant bail application for the reason that case has already been disposed of. Accordingly instant criminal bail application is dismissed being infructuous. Judge
